svg.title: Figure 3. Calibration row for a baseline-impossible public event
svg.desc: Compact calibration strip for a nuts-chop toy row. The selected public channel is actions_only. The detection basis is baseline_impossible_event. Baseline impossible public mass is 1.0, TV per abstract opportunity is 1.0, and T_detect is 1 comparable abstract opportunity.
svg.text: Figure 3. Calibration row for a baseline-impossible public event
Toy calibration row for public-signal machinery; this is not the main strategy example.
candidate row: IP_vs_bet|fold->call|shift=1.0 | shift=1.0 | observation distance=1.0 | worst-tie EV delta=0.950
Secondary note: KL is not the main visual; JSON null for detection_kl_per_hand_nats must not be read as KL zero.
Caption. The nuts-chop row is a calibration diagnostic for the public-signal machinery. Under the declared actions_only channel,
the candidate creates a baseline-impossible public event, so the report records detection_time_basis=baseline_impossible_event,
T_detect=1 comparable abstract opportunity, and TV 1.0.
